title: Security: Chrome on Android Tablet Mode Select Dropdown Spinner able to Overlap Fullscreen Notification Toast

attachments.filename: Chrome on Android Tablet Mode - Select Dropdown Spinner overlap Fullscreen Notification Toast.mp4
attachments.local_path: attachments/Chrome on Android Tablet Mode - Select Dropdown Spinner overlap Fullscreen Notification Toast.mp4

description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
On Chrome for Android Tablet (or smallest width set to 600dp or more than 600dp) the select option dropdown menu is displayed using Android Spinner instead of Android Dialog.
